'''Nordra''' was a cold, tectonically-active planet in the [[Inner Rim/Legends|Inner Rim]] Territories. Though located along the famous [[Hydian Way/Legends|Hydian Way]] trade route, it was often bypassed by travelers following the [[Itani Run]] that detoured around the nearby [[Itani Nebula/Legends|Itani Nebula]].

The mountainous frozen landscape was interrupted around low-lying lakes of lava that reached through the planet's crust. Nordra's inhabitants had built their cities in these warmer areas, and had become a hardy race. During the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], they dared to openly speak against the [[Palpatine/Legends|Emperor]].
